rationale: Slice 04 makes contact-kind evaluation explicit, wires PHONE_REVEAL checkout/session metadata through to REVEAL_PHONE consumption, gates phone reveal before exposing phone data, and adds auditable emergency-open behavior. Focused route/library tests and typecheck pass.
